checklist.details: Tax export status is tax_export_ready_with_warnings; rows=8, expected_filled_orders=8.
checklist.title: Trade tax export generated

checklist.details: LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED must stay false until final manual signoff.
checklist.title: Live trading remains disabled

checklist.details: GLOBAL_KILL_SWITCH must stay true before activation.
checklist.title: Global kill switch enabled

checklist.details: Configure and verify at least one alert channel before live activation.
checklist.title: External alert channel configured

checklist.details: Confirm exchange keys are read-only/spot-trading scoped as intended, withdrawal disabled, and IP allowlist enabled where supported.
checklist.title: Credential scope reviewed

checklist.details: Confirm allowed symbols, quote asset, account, and connector are exactly the Phase 6 activation target.
checklist.title: Exchange allowlist reviewed

checklist.details: Human operator signs off the first live order batch size, kill switch procedure, and rollback plan.
checklist.title: Operator activation signoff

runbook: Enable live trading only for the approved small-funds batch.
Submit one controlled live batch and immediately rerun daily report, reconciliation, and tax export.
If any alert fires, activate kill switch and follow the risk-off runbook.
